title: Eternal Christmas
description: A lightweight Minecraft mod that enables snowfall in every biome, regardless of temperature. Perfect for winter-themed worlds, survival challenges, or simply adding a frosty atmosphere.
body:
![Eternal Christmas](https://i.imgur.com/eO10zkd.png)

![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17+-orange)
![Gradle](https://img.shields.io/badge/Gradle-Build-black?logo=gradle)
![NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge-1.21.1-red)

A lightweight Minecraft mod that enables **snowfall in every biome**, regardless of temperature.
Perfect for winter-themed worlds, survival challenges, or simply adding a frosty atmosphere.


## **✨ Features**

* Snow can fall in **all biomes**, including deserts, jungles, savannas, and more.
* Preserves Minecraft’s natural weather cycle—just expands snow generation rules.
* Fully compatible with **NeoForge 1.21.1**.
* Lightweight and performance-friendly.


## **🧊 Compatibility**

* Works with most biome/world generation mods.
* Should not conflict with mods that don't alter temperature-based weather behaviors.

## **💬 Feedback**

Found a bug? Have a suggestion?
Open an issue in Github or submit a pull request, contributions are welcome!
